creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 213435
patch to update the port

- update 0.33 -> 0.39
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/indirect
- add LICENSE_FILE
- add TEST_DEPENDS
- request maintainership, as Dan Rench <citric@cubicone.tmetic.com> 
	is absent for 7+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/p5-indirect/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p3 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.2
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
